item.title: Version 1.2.0
item.description:
What's New in 1.2.0

Added

  • "When clearing formatting" options with inline help:
  • `CleanPaste AppStore` Xcode target (sandboxed, Sparkle-free) for Mac App Store distribution
  • Sandbox-friendly app picker using `NSOpenPanel` under the `APPSTORE` flag

Changed

  • Manual and automatic stripping now run through a shared `TextCleaner` that honors the new cleaning options
  • Release workflow creates the GitHub Release via the `gh` CLI instead of a Node-based action
